# LINCE v2 Policy File Reference

Key reference for `~/.config/lince/lince.toml` (and the project overlay `<project>/.lince/lince.toml`, same schema without `version`). Compose with `lince-config apply`; edit with `lince-config set <key> <value> --target lince`; validate with `lince-config validate --target lince`.

## Top-level keys

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `version` | str | — | **required** — — |

| Key | Type | Default | Description |
|-----|------|---------|-------------|
| `default` | `"deny"` \| `"allow"` | — | — |
| `allowed_hosts` | list[string] | — | — |
| `blocked_hosts` | list[string] | — | — |
